query:
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as date,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM biddings
WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-01-23'
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt);

SELECT 
  DATE(publicationDate) as pub_date,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM biddings
WHERE DATE(publicationDate) = '2026-01-23'
GROUP BY DATE(publicationDate);

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM biddings;
